pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"本仓库是 Gentoo 的 Stage 3 镜像。"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"distfiles-配置","children":"Distfiles 配置"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/portage/make.conf"}]," 中加入："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","filepath":"/etc/portage/make.conf","enableQuickSetup":true,"append":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["关于 Portage 配置可以参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../gentoo-portage/","children":"Gentoo Portage 镜像"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["配置好 Portage 与 Distfiles 后，执行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"emerge --sync"}]," 进行更新。"]}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"gentoo-prefix-bootstrap-镜像配置","children":"Gentoo Prefix Bootstrap 镜像配置"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"在运行 Bootstrap 脚本之前，可通过设置以下环境变量选择 Bootstrap 过程中使用的镜像。"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","code",null,{"children":"GNU_URL"}]," 的具体设置可以参考 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"../gnu/","children":"GNU 帮助"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["Bootstrap 成功后，若对 Gentoo Portage 和 Distfiles 换源，可参照以上几节，只需将 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc"}]," 换成 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"$EPREFIX/etc"}]]}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("export GENTOO_MIRRORS=\"");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("\"");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("export SNAPSHOT_URL=\"");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/snapshots\"");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("# export GNU_URL=\"http://mirror/gnu\"");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
